onboarding.subgreeting: Let me understand your financial world before I help.
questions: When did you last feel stressed about money?
Do you prefer knowing every rupee, or roughly where things stand?
Have you ever invested money and regretted it?
Do you have any emergency savings?
Do you track your monthly expenses?

dashboard.healthHint: Good start. Three quick wins ahead
dashboard.schemeAlertDetail: Worth over 7 lakh in benefits. Tap to check.
dashboard.bufferNeeded: You need 5,800 more to reach safety buffer
dashboard.schemesDetail: Total potential benefits worth over ₹7.2 lakh. You are 97% likely to qualify.

scam.title: Scam Firewall
scam.subtitle: Paste any message to analyse
scam.placeholder: Paste any suspicious message, offer, or forward...
scam.teachingSummary: Remember these three red flags: guaranteed returns are always a lie, urgency is manufactured to prevent thinking, and no legitimate scheme works through private WhatsApp groups.
scam.step1Desc: Paste any WhatsApp message, job offer, or SMS that seems too good to be true.
scam.step2Desc: Our AI scans for psychological triggers like "Urgency", "Guaranteed Returns", and "Unverified Links".
scam.step3Desc: We provide the specific technique being used to manipulate you and the legal context.
scam.proTipText: Remember: If a job asks you to pay money to start working, it is 100% a scam. No legitimate company in India works this way.
scam.noPatternsFound: No common manipulation patterns found. However, always verify company registrations at sebi.gov.in before sharing any OTP or making payments.

samples.title: Job Scam
samples.text: CONGRATULATIONS! You have been selected for a WORK FROM HOME job. Earn ₹5000 daily by just liking YouTube videos. No experience needed. Join our Telegram group NOW to start: https://t.me/quick_earn_india. LIMITED SLOTS LEFT!

samples.title: OTP Fraud
samples.text: Your SBI account has been blocked due to suspicious activity. To verify your identity, enter the OTP sent to your mobile number. Hurry, your account will be permanently closed in 30 minutes!

samples.title: Electricity Bill Scam
samples.text: URGENT: Your electricity bill for this month is pending. Click here to pay now and avoid disconnection: https://bit.ly/fake-bill-link

schemes.title: Your Scheme Matches
schemes.subtitle: Based on your profile, you likely qualify
schemes.closingNote: One afternoon. That's all it takes. This could save you from borrowing again if you're sick.
schemes.visitNearestCSC: Visit the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) in Pune for free assistance with the application process.

docs.title: Document Intelligence
docs.subtitle: Upload any financial document. I'll find what they don't want you to notice.
docs.uploadHint: Tap to upload a loan letter, insurance policy, or bank document
docs.name: Name
docs.aiReadingModeDetail:
Financial documents are often written in complex "legalese" to hide high interest rates and fees.

ArthSaathi AI extracts key numbers and flags predatory clauses so you don't get trapped in a debt cycle.

voice.say: Say a page name to navigate

guaranteed-returns.explanation: No legitimate investment can legally guarantee returns. SEBI explicitly prohibits this. Anyone promising guaranteed returns is either lying or running an illegal scheme.

urgency.explanation: Creating a fake deadline forces you to make a rushed decision without researching. Legitimate investments are available tomorrow. Fake ones need you to act before you think.
urgency.legalContext: Common in Ponzi schemes and pump-and-dump operations

exclusivity.explanation: Making you feel specially chosen lowers your guard and makes you feel you'd be foolish to refuse. Real financial products don't work through secret WhatsApp groups.
exclusivity.legalContext: Classic social engineering used in pyramid and MLM schemes

authority-impersonation.explanation: Using RBI or SEBI's name creates false trust. The RBI does not approve individual investment schemes. SEBI does not endorse specific returns. Always verify at sebi.gov.in or rbi.org.in directly.
authority-impersonation.legalContext: Impersonating government bodies is a criminal offense under IPC Section 416

social-proof.explanation: Claiming thousands of happy investors creates a herd mentality. These numbers are unverifiable. In Ponzi schemes, early investors do genuinely earn — until the scheme collapses and everyone else loses.

pmjay.name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
pmjay.description: Free health insurance of ₹5 lakh per year for hospitalisation

steps.title: Find your nearest CSC centre
steps.detail: Visit locator.csccloud.in — there are 3 centres within 5km of your PIN code (411001).

steps.title: Carry these documents
steps.detail: Aadhaar card (original + copy), ration card if available, income proof (any 2 Zomato/Swiggy payment screenshots).

steps.title: Get your e-card generated
steps.detail: The CSC operator will verify your eligibility on PMJAY portal and generate your Golden Card on the spot.

steps.title: Download and save the e-card
steps.detail: Save the card PDF to your phone. You can also access it anytime at beneficiary.nha.gov.in

epfo.name: EPFO Unorganised Worker Registration
epfo.description: National database for unorganised workers with accident insurance and social security benefits

steps.title: Go to eshram.gov.in
steps.detail: Open on your phone browser. No app needed.

steps.title: Register with Aadhaar + mobile OTP
steps.detail: Your mobile number must be linked to Aadhaar. If not, update at nearest Aadhaar centre first.

steps.title: Fill occupation details
steps.detail: Select 'Transport' → 'Delivery Worker' from the dropdown. Add your bank account for future benefit transfers.

steps.title: Download your e-SHRAM card
steps.detail: UAN (Universal Account Number) is generated instantly. The ₹2 lakh accident cover is active immediately.

pmsby.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
pmsby.description: Accidental death and disability insurance for ₹20 per year — cheapest insurance in India

steps.title: Open your bank's app or visit branch
steps.detail: Available at all public sector banks and most private banks. Can be done in net banking under 'Insurance' tab.

steps.title: Select PMSBY and link your savings account
steps.detail: ₹20 is auto-debited from your account on June 1 each year. That's less than one delivery order.

steps.title: Note your policy number
steps.detail: Save the SMS confirmation. Nominees can claim ₹2 lakh in case of accidental death or full disability.
